message:
fix(action-timeline): resolve borrow checker issues and update snapshots (bd-11ck.1)

Fix double-mutable-borrow in synthetic_event calls by using temporary variable.
Re-bless snapshot files with corrected initial state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,14 +2,14 @@
